effect_description.de: 60% weniger Gesundheitsverlust und Blutung, Dauer abhängig von Qualität (5-15 Minuten)
effect_description.it: 60% in meno di perdita di salute e sanguinamento, durata dipende dalla qualità (5-15 minuti)
effect_description.en: 60% less health loss and bleeding, duration depends on quality (5-15 minutes)

effect_description.de: +60% Ausdauer, +30% Ausdauerregeneration für eine Stunde
effect_description.it: +60% resistenza, +30% rigenerazione resistenza per un'ora
effect_description.en: +60% stamina, +30% stamina regeneration for one hour

it.description: 1 x Erba di San Giovanni pestare

effect_description.de: +7 Reiten und Hundeflüsterer für einen Tag, Tiere reagieren später auf Heinrich, Hunde gar nicht
effect_description.it: +7 Cavalcare e Sussurratore di Cani per un giorno, gli animali reagiscono più tardi a Heinrich, i cani per niente
effect_description.en: +7 Riding and Dog Handling for one day, animals take less notice of you, dogs won't bark at you

effect_description.de: +7 Redekunst, 50% mehr Lesegeschwindigkeit und -erfahrung für einen Tag
effect_description.it: +7 Eloquenza, 50% in più di velocità di lettura ed esperienza per un giorno
effect_description.en: +7 Speech, 50% faster reading speed and +50% reading experience for one day

it.description: 1 x Erba di San Giovanni pestare

effect_description.de: Heilt Vergiftungen, -30 Sattheit, +3 Vitalität für 20 Minuten
effect_description.it: Cura gli avvelenamenti, -30 sazietà, +3 vitalità per 20 minuti
effect_description.en: Cures poisoning, -30 nourishment, +3 vitality for 20 minutes

effect_description.de: +30 Energie, 50% geringerer Energieverbrauch für einen Tag
effect_description.it: +30 energia, 50% meno consumo di energia per un giorno
effect_description.en: +30 Energy, 50% less energy consumption for one day

effect_description.de: Zwei Tage lang fünffache Heilung und dreifache Energieregeneration im Schlaf
effect_description.it: Per due giorni guarigione quintupla e rigenerazione energetica tripla nel sonno
effect_description.en: Five times faster healing and three times faster energy regeneration during sleep for two days

effect_description.de: Entfernt Trunkenheit und Kater, unterdrückt Trunksucht für drei Stunden
effect_description.it: Rimuove ubriachezza e sbornia, sopprime la dipendenza dall'alcol per tre ore
effect_description.en: Removes drunkenness and hangover, suppresses alcoholism for three hours

effect_description.de: +10 Charisma für zehn Minuten, -7 Charisma mit anderem Parfüm
effect_description.it: +10 carisma per dieci minuti, -7 carisma con altro profumo
effect_description.en: +10 charisma for ten minutes, -7 charisma with other perfume

effect_description.de: +5 Charisma für 40 Minuten, -5 Charisma mit anderem Parfüm
effect_description.it: +5 carisma per 40 minuti, -5 carisma con altro profumo
effect_description.en: +5 charisma for 40 minutes, -5 charisma with other perfume

effect_description.de: Entfernt Kater und heilt 60 Gesundheit innerhalb einer Minute
effect_description.it: rimuove la sbornia e cura 60 salute entro un minuto
effect_description.en: Removes hangover and heals 60 health within one minute

effect_description.de: +6 Agilität, -30% Ausdauerverbrauch beim Spurten für 20 Minuten
effect_description.it: +6 agilità, -30% consumo resistenza durante lo scatto per 20 minuti
effect_description.en: +6 agility, -30% stamina consumption while sprinting for 20 minutes

effect_description.de: Starker selbstgebrannter Alkohol, macht betrunken und hebt die Stimmung
effect_description.it: Forte alcol distillato fatto in casa, ubriaca e migliora l'umore
effect_description.en: Strong homemade alcohol, causes drunkenness and improves mood

effect_description.de: Unterdrückt Verletzungseffekte (verschwommene Sicht usw.), -75% max. Ausdauerverlust bei Gesundheitsverlust für 15 Minuten
effect_description.it: Sopprime gli effetti delle ferite (vista offuscata ecc.), -75% perdita massima resistenza per perdita salute per 15 minuti
effect_description.en: Suppresses injury effects (blurred vision, etc.), -75% max. stamina loss when health is lost for 15 minutes

effect_description.de: Nachtsicht und kein Energieverlust für 25 Minuten
effect_description.it: visione notturna e nessuna perdita di energia per 25 minuti
effect_description.en: Night vision and no stamina loss for 25 minutes

effect_description.de: Opfer kann nicht rennen, -5 Waffenfertigkeiten, zieht langsam 50 Gesundheit ab
effect_description.it: la vittima non può correre, -5 abilità con armi, sottrae lentamente 50 salute
effect_description.en: Victim cannot run, -5 weapon skills, slowly drains 50 health away

effect_description.de: Waffen- und Kesselgift, senkt Energie auf 0, vermindert Wahrnehmung und senkt Ausdauer und Ausdauerregeneration um 50% für einen Tag
effect_description.it: Armi e veleno bollente, riduce l'energia a 0, diminuisce la percezione e riduce la resistenza e la rigenerazione della resistenza del 50% per un giorno.
effect_description.en: Weapon and cauldron poison, reduces energy to 0, diminishes perception, and reduces stamina and stamina regeneration by 50% for one day.

effect_description.de: Kesselgift, -110 Gesundheit in 15 Sekunden, Opfer kann nicht rennen
effect_description.it: veleno per calderone, -110 salute in 15 secondi, la vittima non può correre

effect_description.it: +8 tiro con arco e mirare non costa resistenza per 15 minuti
effect_description.en: +8 Marksmanship and aiming do not cost stamina for 15 minutes.

it.description: 1 x Erba di San Giovanni pestare

effect_description.de: +6 Stärke, -35% Ausdauerkosten bei Angriff und Verteidigung für 15 Minuten
effect_description.it: +6 forza, -35% costi resistenza in attacco e difesa per 15 minuti
effect_description.en: +6 Strength, -35% Stamina cost when attacking and defending for 15 minutes

effect_description.de: Speichert das Spiel, heilt 30% Gesundheit, +3 Stärke, Vitalität und Agilität für zwei Stunden
effect_description.it: Salva la partita, cura il 30% della salute, +3 forza, vitalità e agilità per due ore
effect_description.en: Saves the game, heals 30% health, +3 strength, vitality, and agility for two hours

effect_description.de: 11 Seife, reinigt Kleidung bei einer Waschstelle
effect_description.it: 11 Sapone, pulisce i vestiti in un lavatoio
effect_description.en: 11 Soap, cleans clothes at a washing place

effect_description.de: +8 Handwerk & Stehlen für eine Stunde
effect_description.it: +8 artigianato e furto per un'ora
effect_description.en: +8 craftsmanship & thievery for one hour

effect_description.de: Trank, der alle Spezialisierungspunkte zurücksetzen und eine Neuverteilung ermöglichen
effect_description.it: Pozione che azzera tutti i punti specializzazione e consente una nuova distribuzione.
effect_description.en: Potion that resets all specialisation points and allows them to be redistributed

effect_description.de: Lässt die beängstigenden Gedanken und boshaften Stimmen verstummen. Heilt über einen Zeitraum von 8 Stunden 75 Gesundheit, +3 Vitalität und nicht geblockte Treffer verursachen 10 % weniger Schaden.
effect_description.it: Zittisce i pensieri spaventosi e le voci maligne. Cura 75 punti salute in 8 ore, +3 vitalità e i colpi non bloccati infliggono il 10% di danni in meno.
effect_description.en: Silences frightening thoughts and malicious voices. Heals 75 health over 8 hours, +3 vitality and unblocked hits deal 10% less damage.
